---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new scenario, control, template field, walkthrough, or artifact extension
title: '[Feature] '
labels: ['enhancement', 'triage']
assignees: ''
---

## Which artifact would this affect?

<!-- Tick the one(s) that apply. -->

- [ ] **MDRS calculator** — new dimension, preset, or scoring logic
- [ ] **STRIDE-HC templates** — new scenario library entry, new archetype, new category
- [ ] **CJR templates** — new template field, new worked example, new constraint type
- [ ] **Test harness** — new attack scenario, new control profile, new device emulator
- [ ] **MFA shim** — new feature in the prototype, new hardware-port note, new FDA consideration
- [ ] **Documentation** — new walkthrough, new FAQ entry, new cross-reference
- [ ] **Repo infrastructure** — CI, packaging, badges, accessibility, etc.
- [ ] **Other** (describe below)

## What problem are you trying to solve?

<!-- Describe the use case. What's currently impossible, painful, or confusing? -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- Describe what you'd like to see. Be as concrete as possible — sketch the new file, field, scenario, or interaction. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- What other approaches did you think about? Why is your proposed solution preferable? -->

## Standards / regulatory alignment

<!-- For templates and frameworks: which standards or regulatory provisions does this support?
     For example: ISO 14971 cl.X, AAMI TIR57 §Y, FDA §524B section Z, NIST CSF 2.0 function W. -->

## Scope and impact

- **How many users would benefit?** <!-- Niche use case? Common scenario? -->
- **Does this require a breaking change?** <!-- Yes/No — and to which existing field/file/API? -->
- **Estimated effort:** <!-- Quick patch / medium / multi-week -->

## Are you willing to contribute the PR?

<!-- Tick one. -->

- [ ] Yes, I plan to open a PR
- [ ] Yes, with guidance from the maintainers
- [ ] No, but I can review one
- [ ] No, suggesting this as input

## Additional context

<!-- References to relevant published research, vendor advisories, regulatory updates, or related issues. -->
